description:
Demon Huntress is a top-down roguelike shooter built around fast combat, endless progression, and outrageous power scaling.
Each run sends you through three randomized worlds chosen from five distinct areas, each filled with demons, traps, treasures, and escalating danger. Combat is fluid and aggressive, centered around precise movement, dodge rolls, and ranged combat using a powerful crossbow.
During a run, you unlock randomized spells and upgrades: traps, rotating magical orbs, spirit companions, passive buffs, auras, and more. Every choice shapes your build, creating wildly different playstyles from run to run.
Beyond each run lies permanent progression. Souls collected from fallen demons unlock powerful meta upgrades that persist forever. Stack multiple dodge rolls, trigger chain lightning, drain life on hit, leave fire trails behind you, or cause enemies to explode. These upgrades compound over time, turning early struggles into late-game dominance.
The more you play, the more broken you become.
With randomized runs, massive build variety, and permanent progression that rewards dedication, Demon Huntress delivers a roguelike power fantasy where growth never stops—and demons never stand a chance.
